805: // Custom backprop for filter that explicitly does the work sharding and calls
806: // Eigen only to multiply matrices.
807: template <typename Device, class T>
808: class Conv3DCustomBackpropFilterOp : public OpKernel {
809:   // Limit the maximum size of allocated temporary buffer to
810:   // kMaxTempAllocationOverhead times the size of the input tensors (input,
811:   // filter, out_backprop). If the size of the temporary buffer exceeds this
812:   // limit, fallback on Eigen implementation.
813:   static constexpr int kMaxTempAllocationOverhead = 25;
814: 
815:  public:
816:   explicit Conv3DCustomBackpropFilterOp(OpKernelConstruction* context)
817:       : OpKernel(context),
818:         data_format_(FORMAT_NHWC),
819:         takes_shape_(type_string().find("V2") != std::string::npos) {
820:     // data_format is only available in V2.

822:       string data_format;
823:       OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, context->GetAttr("data_format", &data_format));
824:       OP_REQUIRES(context, FormatFromString(data_format, &data_format_),
825:                   errors::InvalidArgument("Invalid data format"));
826:       OP_REQUIRES(
827:           context, data_format_ == FORMAT_NHWC,
828:           errors::InvalidArgument(
829:               "Conv3DBackpropFilterOpV2 only supports NDHWC on the CPU."));
830:     }
831: 
832:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, context->GetAttr("dilations", &dilation_));
833:     OP_REQUIRES(context, dilation_.size() == 5,
834:                 errors::InvalidArgument("Dilation rates field must "
835:                                         "specify 5 dimensions"));
836:     OP_REQUIRES(context,
837:                 (GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, 'C') == 1 &&
838:                  GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, 'N') == 1),
839:                 errors::InvalidArgument(
840:                     "Current implementation does not yet support "
841:                     "dilation rates in the batch and depth dimensions."));
842: 
843:     // TODO(yangzihao): Add CPU version of dilated conv 3D.
844:     OP_REQUIRES(context,
845:                 (GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, '0') == 1 &&

847:                  GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, '2') == 1),
848:                 errors::InvalidArgument(
849:                     "Current CPU implementation does not yet support "
850:                     "dilation rates larger than 1."));
851: 
852:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, context->GetAttr("strides", &stride_));

862:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, context->GetAttr("padding", &padding_));
863:   }
